title: hippeastrum teyucuarense
intro: Hippeastrum teyucuarense is a species of flowering bulbous perennial plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. Native to Peru, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Hippeastrum teyucuarense include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used to make a tincture or ointment, to harness its medicinal properties.
